description: When target users include vulnerable populations (mental health conditions, learning disabilities, autism, cognitive impairments), standard WCAG compliance is insufficient. Additional considerations beyond technical accessibility are required.

requirements.requirement: Plain English / Easy Read content alternatives
requirements.rationale: Users with learning disabilities need simplified language

requirements.requirement: Native HTML elements over enhanced UI components
requirements.rationale: Custom components break assistive technology patterns
May cause anxiety or sensory overload
Cognitive processing may require more time

requirements.requirement: Explicit analytics consent with clear language
requirements.rationale: Vulnerable users may be sensitive to being observed

antiPatterns.pattern: Dynamic content without ARIA live announcements
antiPatterns.alternative: aria-live regions for all dynamic content
Honeypot fields, accessible CAPTCHA, or server-side validation

antiPatterns.pattern: Session recording without explicit sensitive-context consent
antiPatterns.problem: May create anxiety about being watched
antiPatterns.alternative: Clear opt-in with explanation of purpose

successCriteria: Specialist accessibility audit WITH users from target population (not just automated tools)
